title: Watdad
description: Ultimate tool to catch xrayers much easier with a few, very useful features partly built upon Coreprotect. Optimal for the staff team in a server.
body:
# ﻿Watdad Mod toolkit for Minecraft moderators ## What is Watdad?
Watdad is a mod designed to support moderation. With this can you easily track x-rayers. ## Why this mod?
Well, with this mod can you or your staff team watch what xrayers see when they are cheating. This is completely fool proof, as the ore highlighting is locked behind spectator mode and the highlighting doesn't glow through walls. So your own staff won't abuse this mod. ## Features
| What? | How? | Description | |-------------------------------|-------------------------------------------------|--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------| | Legal xray | Enable spectator mode | See what xrayers see, locked behind spectator mode, so staff can't abuse it. | | Coreprotect inspect indicator | `/co i` (Coreprotect command) | Red visible outlines on the block you're looking at. | | Instant coreprotect lookup | `/xray ` | Instant coreprotect lookup command for tracing xrayers in deepslate or stone level (gold mining).| ## More info
You can view additional info or open source in the source code:
https://github.com/pernio/watdad
